problem.title: HDL-Graph-SLAM on the public HDL-400 reference window
problem.question: How does HDL-Graph-SLAM perform on the public HDL-400 reference window?

dataset.reference_role: public reference trajectory converted from pose_trace.csv

variants.label: Fast
variants.intent: Coarsen registration and submap density while trimming keyframe and loop-closure work for faster pose-graph updates.

variants.label: Dense
variants.intent: Densify registration and submaps while keeping every keyframe and loop-closure constraint active.
